text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap doesn't seem to be feeling very well.
Her face looks a little pale.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Mm... Tama and I went to this dessert cafe with an
early bird menu...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then, on our way back, we were on this packed
train.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The dense crowd and stuffy air left me feeling
unwell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's quite out of it today. It seems the stress has
really gotten to her.
